diff:
diff --git a/src/flatten.py b/src/flatten.py
index 6f1c2f2..34829ca 100644
--- a/src/flatten.py
+++ b/src/flatten.py
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 def flatten_once(values):
     flattened = []
     for value in values:
-        if isinstance(value, (list, tuple, str, bytes)):
+        if isinstance(value, (list, tuple)):
             flattened.extend(value)
         else:
             flattened.append(value)
